org.apache.bookkeeper.proto.checksum.CRC32DigestManager.CRC32Digest

Packages that use CRC32DigestManager.CRC32Digest
Package
Description
org.apache.bookkeeper.proto.checksum
Classes related to the Bookkeeper checksum.

  • Uses of CRC32DigestManager.CRC32Digest in org.apache.bookkeeper.proto.checksum

    Classes in org.apache.bookkeeper.proto.checksum that implement CRC32DigestManager.CRC32Digest
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    (package private) class 
    DirectMemoryCRC32Digest
    Specialized implementation of CRC32 digest that uses reflection on CRC32 class to get access to "updateByteBuffer" method and pass a direct memory pointer.
    (package private) class 
    StandardCRC32Digest
    Regular implementation of CRC32 digest that makes use of CRC32 class.
